ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "medical_record_number" TEXT /* Medical record number of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "abnormalities" (
  "abnormality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each abnormality */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Reference to the patient associated with the abnormality */,
  "abnormality_type" TEXT /* Type of the abnormality (e.g., calcification) */,
  "cropped_image_path" TEXT /* File path to the cropped image of the abnormality */,
  "breast_density" INTEGER /* Breast density of the patient (e.g., 1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  "image_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the full mammography image */,
  "roi_mask_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the ROI mask image */,
  "assessment" INTEGER /* Assessment score of the abnormality (e.g., 1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  "calc_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution type of the calcification (e.g., REGIONAL, SEGMENTAL, DIFFUSELY_SCATTERED, None) */,
  "pathology" TEXT /* Pathology classification (e.g., BENIGN, MALIGNANT, BENIGN_WITHOUT_CALLBACK) */,
  "image_view" TEXT /* View of the image (e.g., MLO, CC) */,
  "subtlety" INTEGER /* Subtlety score of the abnormality (e.g., 1, 2, 3, 4, 5) */,
  "calc_type" TEXT /* Type of calcification (e.g., PLEOMORPHIC-PLEOMORPHIC, EGGSHELL, AMORPHOUS-PLEOMORPHIC, PUNCTATE-ROUND_AND_REGULAR) */,
  "left_or_right_breast" TEXT /* Breast side (e.g., LEFT, RIGHT) */,
  "detection_date" TEXT /* Date when the abnormality was detected */,
  "detection_method" TEXT /* Method used for detecting the abnormality (e.g., manual, AI-assisted) */,
  "assigned_radiologist" INTEGER /* ID of the radiologist assigned to the abnormality */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the abnormality (e.g., pending, in-progress, resolved) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes related to the abnormality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("abnormality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_abnormalities_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., radiologist, technician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "radiologist_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "abnormality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the abnormality */,
  "radiologist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the radiologist assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_radiologist_assignments_abnormality_id FOREIGN KEY ("abnormality_id") REFERENCES abnormalities ("abnormality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_radiologist_assignments_radiologist_id FOREIGN KEY ("radiologist_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion */,
  "abnormality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the abnormality */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or discussion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_discussions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_discussions_abnormality_id FOREIGN KEY ("abnormality_id") REFERENCES abnormalities ("abnormality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
